NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL.description: Supabase project URL (public, can be exposed in browser)

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.description: Supabase anon key (public, for client-side auth)

NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL.description: API base URL (for development: http://localhost:3000, production: https://yourdomain.com)

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth Client ID (from Google Cloud Console)

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google OAuth Client Secret (secret, set in Vercel environment)

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for webhook signature verification

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Supabase service role key for server-side operations (secret, never expose to client)

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://js.stripe.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://*.sentry.io; frame-src https://js.stripe.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:
